matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: transiently expressed in a murine neuroblastoma cell line the soluble, barely cytotoxic RepA-WH1 wild type [RepA-WH1(WT)] and assayed its response to exposure to in vitro-assembled RepA-WH1(A31V) amyloid fibers
the hyperamyloidogenic variant RepA-WH1(A31V) forms particles of various sizes

primary_variables.matched_definition: Perturbation where an exogenous chemical compound or pharmacologic agent is administered.
evidence: Tet-ON expression was induced by doxycycline (Sigma)
THN-rtTA/SH-SY5Y cells having integrated pTRE3G-WH1(WT)-TagGFP2 or pTRE3G-TagGFP2, both after induction with Dox (0.5 ug/ml) for 48 h
N2a cells transfected with pcDNA3.1-WH1(WT)-mCherry or pcDNA3.1-mCherry and incubated with in vitro-assembled WH1(A31V) fibers for 48 h
N2a cells were exposed to RepA-WH1(A31V)-Alexa 488 fibers (1 μM in equivalent protein monomers) in the growth medium

attributes.route_or_context: induction of Tet-ON expression in SH-SY5Y cells
evidence: THN-rtTA/SH-SY5Y cells having integrated pTRE3G-WH1(WT)-TagGFP2 or pTRE3G-TagGFP2, both after induction with Dox (0.5 ug/ml) for 48 h
incubated with in vitro-assembled WH1(A31V) fibers for 48 h
after induction with Dox (0.5 ug/ml) for 48 h

case_arms: pcDNA3.1-WH1(WT)-mCherry transfected N2a cells + WH1(A31V) fibers
pTRE3G-WH1(WT)-TagGFP2 expressing SH-SY5Y cells + N2a donor cells expressing WH1(A31V)-mCherry
replicate_hints: All experiments were carried out in triplicate.

evidence: Data representing proteins identified in naive N2a murine control cells were subtracted from data representing those found in N2a cells expressing WH1(WT)-mCherry or mCherry and incubated (or not) with fibers.

Data representing proteins found in naive human THN-rtTA/SH-SY5Y control cells were subtracted from data representing those found in THN-rtTA/SH-SY5Y cells expressing WH1(WT)-TagGFP2 or TagGFP2 and cocultured (or not) with the murine donor cells.

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment used a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer with a 'full scan' method followed by selecting the 15 most intense precursor ions for MS/MS fragmentation, which is characteristic of Data Dependent Acquisition (DDA). No labeling (SILAC, TMT, dimethyl) is mentioned; the study uses a subtractive approach based on protein presence/absence and relative abundance across conditions.
